violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the dining area & front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (tomatoes) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (potato cutter, can opener) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Cheese and cut iceberg lettuce were observed held at 49-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC took dishwasher out of service at time of inspection. PIC informed to sanitize in 3 bay sink until serviced and dispensing proper concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the dining area & front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Per interview with PIC, work order has been submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
Prep unit located in the kitchen area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 47F. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
Prep unit door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice used for drinks. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of orange biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The coving in the ware washing area was in poor repair, inspector observed incomplete seal. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024
Employees were observed changing gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service and cleaned during time of inspection. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by flies in the kitchen and bar. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit and equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility, especially under and behind equipment in the kitchen, the bar and bar floor mats, and storage area, have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. The person in charge showed proof that 7 employees took a food safety course on 5/6/23. Employees have not received grades yet. Please email inspector grades upon completion. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

Raw animal foods (such as hamburgers) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cheese) in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as cheese during storage. Raw hamburgers were relocated during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
